To: contact@holler.io

Subject: Complaint about the Employee Kicky Liu

Dear Sir/Madam

I am writing to express my discontent with your employee Kicky Lau misbehaviour. It was found that Ms Liu has been spreading hatred speech and racist remarks on social media. Attached are evidence showing that she calls Hong Kong protesters cockroaches and that she opposes to the protest events which demonstrate Hong Kong people’s pursuit for freedom and democracy. I therefore suspect that she may probably be an anti-Americanist. The case has been reported to the USCIS. I hereby urge you to handle Ms Lau’s misbehaviour.

Yours faithfully

A Hong Kong citizen

I would like to bring to your attention that one of your employees, Kicky Lau, has been spreading hate speeches on various social media platforms denigrating the protesters/citizens of Hong Kong by describing them with a derogatory term "cockroaches".

As you might be aware, Hongkongers are currently engaged in a David vs Goliath battle against their government and the Communist Party of China. Hongkongers are fighting for their freedom and democracy - the very same freedom that our founding fathers and patriots fought for with their blood and tears in the United States.

From seeing Kicky Lau's public photos on social media, she clearly enjoys the democratic way of life and feels entitled to freedom in the U.S., but yet, hypocritically wishes ill will towards others who are pursuing the same elsewhere. I hope Kicky Lau's troubling and derogatory comments on social media is entirely of her own and do not reflect the views of your company.
